atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive to inline utility classes into a CSS rule.

atDirectives.name: @reference
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive to reference another stylesheet for directives like @apply in isolated contexts (e.g. Vue SFC scoped styles).

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive to declare theme variables.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive to define custom utilities.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive to apply a variant within custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive to define custom variants.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive to register additional content sources.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive to load a config file (legacy/compat usage).

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive to load a plugin (legacy/compat usage).

atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v3 directive for injecting base/components/utilities.
